title: Man dies in accident on N2 near Great Brak River
description: GREAT BRAK RIVER NEWS - A 40-year-old man...
bodyText:
Breaking News

GREAT BRAK RIVER NEWS - A 40-year-old man died in an accident on the N2 near Great Brak River yesterday.

Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies says a preliminary investigation suggests that a vehicle left the road at around 15:00.

He says upon arrival police found the driver of the vehicle with serious injuries.

“He was taken to a nearby hospital where he was declared dead last night,” says Spies.

Great Brak River police have opened a culpable homicide docket.

The circumstances surrounding the incident are not yet known.

The identity of the deceased has not yet been released.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
